calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brett S. Lytle, via Zoom, for Ishverbhai Patel, Petitioner.

Mr. Lytle reports of not being able to rebut the presumption in the evidence code cited by the Examiner at this time and asks that the court dismiss the instant petition without prejudice.

The Petition for Spousal Property is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
